description: This generous-sized home is tucked into a quiet Port Moody setting that offers privacy and partial Burrard Inlet views with a picturesque greenbelt backdrop. Main level features a bright kitchen with ample cupboard space and granite countertops, an open and airy living and dining room with balcony access for summer BBQs. Upper floors incl. a primary bedroom with a large walk-in closet and a private sundeck and 2 large bedrooms. Lower level inc. HUGE rec room (used as 4th bedroom + family room), flex area plus a large covered patio & fenced yard. Enjoy 700+ sqft of outdoor space, plus two side-by-side parking stalls and BONUS storage off the carport. Enjoy the indoor pool, sauna, playground and party room- just STEPS AWAY. Close to Barnet Hwy, transit, WCE, SkyTrain, marina, parks & trails.
